SWE-Explore: Benchmarking How Coding Agents Explore Repositories
articles.excerpt: Repository-level coding benchmarks such as SWE-bench have driven a rapid surge in the capabilities of coding agents. articles.summary: 针对现有仓库级编码基准忽视智能体细粒度能力评估的问题，本文提出SWE-Explore基准。该基准专注于评估编码智能体在真实仓库中的探索能力，包括代码导航与理解，旨在提供比二元任务完成度更细致的能力刻画。

articles.title: Imaginative Perception Tokens Enhance Spatial Reasoning in Multimodal Language Models
articles.excerpt: Vision language models (VLMs) excel at many tasks but still struggle with spatial reasoning when critical information is not directly observable. Many such problems require imaginative perception: inferring what would be seen from an unseen viewpoint, tracing paths through occluded spaces, or integr
articles.summary: 针对视觉语言模型在关键信息不可直接观察时的空间推理困难，本文提出“想象性感知token”。该方法使模型能够推理从不可见视角看到的内容、追踪遮挡路径，从而增强其空间推理能力。

articles.title: ResearchClawBench: A Benchmark for End-to-End Autonomous Scientific Research
articles.excerpt: AI coding agents are increasingly used for scientific work, but their end-to-end autonomous research capability remains difficult to verify. We present ResearchClawBench, a benchmark for evaluating autonomous scientific research across 40 tasks from 10 scientific domains. Each task is grounded in a
articles.summary: 为验证AI编码智能体的端到端自主科学研究能力，本文提出ResearchClawBench基准。该基准涵盖10个科学领域的40项任务，每项任务均基于真实科学出版物，为评估自主科研提供了统一框架。

articles.title: On the Geometry of On-Policy Distillation
articles.excerpt: On-policy distillation (OPD) is increasingly used to improve large language model reasoning, but its training dynamics remain poorly understood. We characterize the trajectory of OPD updates in parameter space and compare it with supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning with verifiabl
articles.summary: 本文从几何视角分析了策略蒸馏的训练动态，并与监督微调和基于验证器的强化学习进行了比较。研究发现OPD的更新轨迹与RLVR更为相似，但方向更平滑，揭示了其作为改进大模型推理方法的内在机制。

articles.title: CoVEBench: Can Video Editing Models Handle Complex Instructions?
articles.excerpt: While recent text-guided video editing models excel at elementary tasks (e.g., style transfer, object insertion), real-world user requests are highly compositional. A single prompt often demands multiple coupled edits, such as modifying subjects, actions, and camera views, while strictly preserving
articles.summary: 针对现有文本引导视频编辑模型难以处理复杂组合指令的问题，本文提出CoVEBench基准。该基准评估模型在单个提示要求同时修改主体、动作和视角等多耦合编辑任务中的表现，揭示了现有模型的局限性。

articles.title: LatentSkill: From In-Context Textual Skills to In-Weight Latent Skills for LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Agent systems increasingly use textual skills to encode reusable task procedures, but injecting these skills into the prompt at every step incurs substantial context overhead and exposes skill content as plaintext. We present LatentSkill, a framework that converts textual skills into plug-and-play L
articles.summary: 为解决Agent系统使用文本技能带来的上下文开销和隐私问题，本文提出LatentSkill框架。该框架将文本技能编码为可插拔的LoRA适配器（潜在技能），从而减少了提示长度并保护了技能内容。

articles.title: Latent Spatial Memory for Video World Models
articles.excerpt: Video world models that maintain 3D spatial consistency across generated frames typically rely on explicit point cloud memory constructed in RGB space. This design is both computationally expensive, requiring repeated rendering and VAE encoding, and inherently lossy, as the round trip through pixel
articles.summary: 为替代计算昂贵且有损的显式点云记忆，本文提出用于视频世界模型的隐式空间记忆。该方法使用潜在向量表示来维持帧间的三维空间一致性，在保证生成质量的同时提升了效率。

articles.title: SpatialWorld: Benchmarking Interactive Spatial Reasoning of Multimodal Agents in Real-World Tasks
articles.excerpt: Spatial reasoning is a foundational capability for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to perceive and operate within the physical world. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on passive evaluation (e.g., static VQA) or simulator-specific pipelines, failing to assess general interacti
articles.summary: 为评估多模态智能体在真实世界中的交互式空间推理能力，本文提出SpatialWorld基准。该基准超越静态问答，设计了一系列需要与环境交互才能完成的空间任务，填补了现有评估的空白。

articles.title: FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Lightning Index Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention
articles.excerpt: Conventional LLMs keep the full KV cache loaded during decoding, causing a severe GPU memory bottleneck for ultra-long context serving. In this report, we propose Lookahead Sparse Attention (LSA), a novel inference paradigm powered by a Neural Memory Indexer built upon the DeepSeek-V4 architecture.
articles.summary: 为解决超长上下文服务中KV缓存导致的GPU内存瓶颈，本文基于DeepSeek-V4提出Lookahead Sparse Attention及Neural Memory Indexer。该方案通过预取和稀疏注意力机制，显著降低内存消耗并支持高效长文本推理。

articles.title: Human Psychometric Questionnaires Mischaracterize LLM Behavior
articles.excerpt: We examine whether human psychometric questionnaires can serve as reliable tools for characterizing and predicting LLM behavior in everyday user interactions. We analyze eight open-source LLMs by comparing their value and personality profiles derived from two different methods: Likert self-reports o
articles.summary: 本文研究人类心理测量问卷能否可靠地表征LLM行为。通过分析八种开源LLM，发现问卷得出的价值和性格档案与LLM在交互中实际行为的相关性很弱，质疑了此类工具的有效性。

articles.title: OmniGameArena: A Unified UE5 Benchmark for VLM Game Agents with Improvement Dynamics
articles.excerpt: Vision-language model (VLM) agents are increasingly deployed in interactive game environments. Yet game benchmarks for VLM agents typically report a single first-attempt score per (agent, game) pair, focus on single-agent Solo play, and lack unified protocols for evaluating heterogeneous agent class
articles.summary: 为统一评估异构VLM游戏智能体，本文提出基于UE5的OmniGameArena基准。该基准支持多智能体评估，并引入改进动态指标，超越了传统的单次尝试评分，能更全面地衡量智能体的学习能力。

articles.title: AHA-WAM:Asynchronous Horizon-Adaptive World-Action Modeling with Observation-Guided Context Routing
articles.excerpt: World-action models have emerged as a promising paradigm for robot manipulation, jointly modeling visual scene dynamics and actions to inject physical priors into policy learning. However, existing world-action models couple world prediction and action execution at the same temporal resolution, forc
articles.summary: 针对现有世界-动作模型耦合世界预测与动作执行导致效率低的问题，本文提出AHA-WAM模型。它通过异步时间分辨率和观察引导的上下文路由，解耦了两者，提升了机器人操作学习的效率和性能。

articles.title: SwiftVR: Real-Time One-Step Generative Video Restoration
articles.excerpt: Real-time video restoration (VR) for live streams requires high-resolution outputs under strict per-frame latency constraints. Existing one-step diffusion-based VR models remain difficult to deploy on consumer-grade GPUs due to two main bottlenecks: quadratic spatial attention at high resolutions an
articles.summary: 为在消费级GPU上实现实时4K视频修复，本文提出SwiftVR方法。通过专有的一步式扩散模型优化和因果注意力机制，解决了高分辨率下注意力计算开销大的问题，实现了低延迟的高质量视频流修复。

articles.title: Bayesian-Agent: Posterior-Guided Skill Evolution for LLM Agent Harnesses
articles.excerpt: LLM agents increasingly rely on external inference conditions: prompts, tools, memory, SOPs, skills, and harness feedback. These assets can improve task execution without changing model weights, but they are often revised by heuristic reflection or by reusing observed successes and failures as if co
articles.summary: 针对LLM智能体外部资产（如技能）更新依赖启发式方法的问题，本文提出Bayesian-Agent框架。它使用贝叶斯后验分布来指导资产的演化，替代了基于成功/失败案例的简单启发式反思，从而提升了智能体性能。

articles.title: Skill-RM: Unifying Heterogeneous Evaluation Criteria via Agent Skill
articles.excerpt: Reward models (RMs) provide critical feedback signals for LLM post-training, notably in reinforced fine-tuning (RFT) and reinforcement learning (RL) pipelines. However, current reward evaluation relies on heterogeneous criteria such as rule-based verifiers, ground-truth references, procedural checkl
articles.summary: 为解决奖励模型评估标准异构（如规则、参考答案、清单）的问题，本文提出Skill-RM。它通过“智能体技能”概念统一了这些标准，输出一个可解释的技能分数，为强化微调和RLHF提供了一致的奖励信号。

articles.title: OmniCap-IF: Benchmarking and Improving Instruction Following Abilities for Omni-Video Captioning
articles.excerpt: While Omni-modal Large Language Models (OLLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in jointly processing audio and visual streams, their ability to strictly adhere to complex, multi-faceted user instructions remains largely unexplored.
